description: Video recommendation algorithm based on readiness assessment results for 5-digit place value

excellent_performance.rationale: Student has excellent understanding of 4-digit place value, can fast-track to 5-digit concepts with challenge

videoSequence.reason: Introduction to 5-digit numbers and ten thousands place
Practice finding place value in 5-digit numbers

ready_performance.rationale: Student is ready, provide complete coverage of 5-digit place value

videoSequence.reason: Place value in 5-digit numbers with examples

partial_readiness.rationale: Student has gaps in 4-digit place value, needs targeted review before 5-digit concepts

adaptiveLogic.description: Select prerequisite videos based on specific weak concepts

not_ready.rationale: Student needs significant prerequisite review in 4-digit place value before attempting 5-digit concepts

videoSequence.reason: Begin main content: Place value examples

postPlaylistAction.message: After watching these prerequisite videos, retake the readiness quiz to check if you're ready to continue with 5-digit place value.

conceptBasedRemediation.description: Map specific weak concepts to remedial videos

place_positions.conceptName: Understanding place positions (ones, tens, hundreds, thousands)

counting_10000.conceptName: Counting and number sense up to 10,000

comprehensionCheckpoints.description: Quick checks during video watching to adjust playlist

questions.question: What is the place value of 7 in 47,825?
questions.explanation: The digit 7 is in the thousands place. So its place value is 7 × 1,000 = 7,000.

questions.question: In 56,234, which digit is in the ten thousands place?
questions.explanation: Reading from left to right: 5 is in the ten thousands place.

ifAllCorrect.message: Excellent! You understand 5-digit place value well.

ifAllWrong.reason: Student struggling with place value concept

questions.question: What is the expanded form of 34,567?
questions.explanation: Expanded form shows place value of each digit: 34,567 = 30,000 + 4,000 + 500 + 60 + 7.

ifWrong.message: Practice writing expanded form before continuing

skip_ahead.action: Skip word form video, jump to practice or challenge

add_support.action: Pause main topic, insert prerequisite review on 4-digit place value

suggest_break.trigger: After 4 videos watched in a single session
suggest_break.action: Suggest taking a 5-minute break before continuing

recommend_practice.trigger: Student completes videos but scores < 70% on checkpoint
recommend_practice.action: Recommend writing 5-digit numbers in all three forms for practice

recommend_retake.trigger: Student in not_ready category completes all prerequisite videos
recommend_retake.action: Strongly recommend retaking readiness assessment before main content

high_score.message: Excellent! You have strong understanding of 4-digit place value. You're ready to learn about 5-digit numbers. We've created a fast-track playlist with challenge content.

good_score.message: Good work! You understand place value well. Let's extend this knowledge to 5-digit numbers with complete coverage.

partial_score.message: You have some gaps in place value knowledge. Don't worry! We'll start with targeted review videos on the concepts you need, then move to 5-digit numbers.

low_score.message: You need to review 4-digit place value basics first. We've created a playlist focused on building strong foundation. After watching, you can retake the quiz and then learn 5-digit concepts.

conceptProgressionMap.description: Shows how place value concepts build on each other

playlistCompletion.description: % of students who watch >= 80% of recommended videos

practiceQuizPassRate.description: % of students who score >= 70% on practice quiz after watching playlist

videoRelevanceRating.description: Average student rating (out of 5) for playlist helpfulness

timeToMastery.description: Average minutes from readiness quiz to practice quiz pass

placeValueIdentification.description: % of students who can correctly identify place value of any digit in 5-digit numbers

formConversion.description: % of students who can convert between standard, expanded, and word forms

implementationNotes.recommendedValidation: Test with 15-20 Grade 4 students across all readiness levels

expectedOutcomes.excellent_students: Complete in 35-40 minutes with 90-100% practice quiz score
expectedOutcomes.ready_students: Complete in 30-35 minutes with 80-90% practice quiz score
expectedOutcomes.partial_students: Complete in 40-45 minutes with 70-80% practice quiz score (after prerequisite review)
expectedOutcomes.not_ready_students: Require prerequisite review (30 min) + retake + main content (20 min) = 50-60 total minutes, expected 60-75% on practice quiz

commonChallenges.challenge1: Students confusing ten thousands place with thousands place
commonChallenges.solution1: Emphasize the progression: ones → tens → hundreds → thousands → ten thousands, using place value chart
commonChallenges.challenge2: Students struggling with reading 5-digit numbers aloud
commonChallenges.solution2: Break into parts: read the ten thousands/thousands part, then say 'thousand,' then read the remaining part
commonChallenges.challenge3: Students making errors in expanded form with zeros (50,007)
commonChallenges.solution3: Show multiple examples with zeros in different positions, explain that zero places are not written in expanded form
